title: Board ⌘K verbs + drag-to-doing → send-to-agent + mobile sheet nav
summary: Wired the U3 board UX edges on top of the BA-server client API (boardApi.claim(id,session,deliver) -> ClaimResult, boardApi.unsend, boardApi.comment, patchIssue). (1) Drag-to-doing now SENDS to the agent: dragging a claimable agent card with a LINKED live session into `doing` calls claimIssue({deliver:true}) and fires a shared-toast 'Sent to <session>' with an Undo action that retracts the still-undelivered steer via boardApi.unsend(session, steer_id) — not just a bare status flip. A card with no linked session keeps the light nudge. (2) Board ⌘K verbs: command-palette gains board-scoped ActionRows (only shown on the /board route via useLocation) — 'Send issue to session…' (pick issue -> pick session -> claim+deliver), 'Comment on issue…' (pick issue -> styled textarea -> boardApi.comment), 'Mark issue done' (pick issue -> patch status='done'). Implemented as a small in-palette step machine (root -> pick-issue -> pick-session/type/act) with a back button + Esc-steps-back, reusing the existing ≥44pt ActionRow pattern and the shared useToast. (3) Mobile: verified board→issue already opens the Vaul ResponsiveSheet (forks on `pointer: coarse`); the route/nav path is mobile-correct. The swipe-up activity detent is intentionally left to U2 (sheet content owner).

tasks.mobile_board_to_issue_vaul_sheet: verified (ResponsiveSheet already forks pointer:coarse; activity detent left to U2)

files_changed: web/src/routes/board.tsx — drag-to-doing claim path now deliver:true + 'Sent to <session>' shared-toast w/ Undo (boardApi.unsend); imports useToast + boardApi; no-session drag keeps the light nudge.

web/src/components/command-palette/command-palette.tsx — board-scoped ⌘K verbs (Send issue to session… / Comment on issue… / Mark issue done) as a step-machine (PaletteMode), IssueRow type + matcher, breadcrumb + back-button + Esc-steps-back, comment textarea composer (no window.prompt), useBoard/useToast/useLocation wiring.

web/tests/e2e/smoke/board-u3-cmdk-drag-send.spec.ts (new) — 4 verification tests against the real binary (drag-sends+toast+Undo+backend doing/session; ⌘K verbs visible + Send claims+delivers; ⌘K Mark done; mobile 430×932 board→issue opens the Vaul sheet).

api_reused.claim_deliver: board.claimIssue({ id, session, deliver: true }) -> ClaimResult { issue, delivered, steer_id }
api_reused.undo: boardApi.unsend(session, steer_id) -> retract the enqueued steer (Undo toast)

verify.build_sh: PASS — bash scripts/build.sh exit 0; binary server/target/release/supermux-server (18M).
verify.web_lint: PASS — cd web && bun run lint: 0 errors (17 pre-existing react-refresh warnings, none in board.tsx / command-palette.tsx).
verify.web_build: PASS — cd web && bun run build (tsc -b && vite build) typechecks + builds clean.
verify.e2e: PASS — playwright smoke: board-u3-cmdk-drag-send.spec.ts 4/4 pass (desktop 1440 drag + ⌘K; mobile 430×932 Vaul sheet). No regression: board-claim-picker.spec.ts (2/2) + board-claim-race-no-500s.spec.ts (1/1) still green.

scope_notes.localized: Edits confined to web/src/routes/board.tsx + web/src/components/command-palette/command-palette.tsx (+ one new e2e spec). Did NOT touch issue-card.tsx (U1) or issue-detail-sheet.tsx (U2).
scope_notes.design: Reused design tokens/springs, shared useToast (44pt Undo hit target, reduced-motion), sentence-case copy, ≥44pt rows (h-11). ⌘K verbs are board-route-scoped so they don't clutter elsewhere.
scope_notes.activity_detent: Mobile swipe-up activity detent left to U2 per the prompt (U2 owns the sheet content); U3 only ensured the route/nav path opens the Vaul sheet.
